verses.latin_vulgate: Psalmus ipsi David.   Dominus regnavit : irascantur populi ;  qui sedet super cherubim : moveatur terra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהֹוָ֣ה מָ֭לָךְ יִרְגְּז֣וּ עַמִּ֑ים יֹשֵׁ֥ב כְּ֝רוּבִ֗ים תָּנ֥וּט הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: A psalm for David himself. The Lord hath reigned, let the people be angry: he that sitteth on the cherubims: let the earth be moved.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra on Kuningas, kansat kiukuitsevat: hän istuu Kerubimin päällä, sentähden liikkuu maailma.
verses.king_james: The Lord reigneth; let the people tremble: he sitteth between the cherubims; let the earth be moved.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus in Sion magnus,  et excelsus super omnes populos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְ֭הֹוָה בְּצִיּ֣וֹן גָּד֑וֹל וְרָ֥ם ה֝֗וּא עַל־כׇּל־הָעַמִּֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord is great in Sion, and high above all people.
verses.finnish_biblia: Suuri on Herra Zionissa, ja korkein kaikkein kansain ylitse.
verses.king_james: The Lord is great in Zion; and he is high above all the people.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confiteantur nomini tuo magno,  quoniam terribile et sanctum est,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יוֹד֣וּ שִׁ֭מְךָ גָּד֥וֹל וְנוֹרָ֗א קָד֥וֹשׁ הֽוּא׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let them give praise to thy great name: for it is terrible and holy:
verses.finnish_biblia: Kiittäkään he sinun suurta ja ihmeellistä nimeäs, joka pyhä on.
verses.king_james: Let them praise thy great and terrible name; for it is holy.

verses.latin_vulgate: et honor regis judicium diligit.  Tu parasti directiones ;  judicium et justitiam in Jacob tu fecisti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעֹ֥ז מֶלֶךְ֮ מִשְׁפָּ֢ט אָ֫הֵ֥ב אַ֭תָּה כּוֹנַ֣נְתָּ מֵישָׁרִ֑ים מִשְׁפָּ֥ט וּ֝צְדָקָ֗ה בְּיַעֲקֹ֤ב ׀ אַתָּ֬ה עָשִֽׂיתָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the king's honour loveth judgment. Thou hast prepared directions: thou hast done judgment and justice in Jacob.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Kuninkaan voima rakastaa oikeutta: sinä toimitat oikeuden, sinä saatat tuomion ja vanhurskauden Jakobissa.
verses.king_james: The king’s strength also loveth judgment; thou dost establish equity, thou executest judgment and righteousness in Jacob.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exaltate Dominum Deum nostrum,  et adorate scabellum pedum ejus,  quoniam sanctum est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רוֹמְמ֡וּ יְ֘הֹוָ֤ה אֱלֹהֵ֗ינוּ וְֽ֭הִשְׁתַּחֲווּ לַהֲדֹ֥ם רַגְלָ֗יו קָד֥וֹשׁ הֽוּא׃
verses.douay_rheims: Exalt ye the Lord our God, and adore his footstool, for it is holy.
verses.finnish_biblia: Korottakaat Herraa meidän Jumalaamme, ja kumartakaat hänen astinlautansa juuressa, sillä hän on pyhä.
verses.king_james: Exalt ye the Lord our God, and worship at his footstool; for he is holy.

verses.latin_vulgate: Moyses et Aaron in sacerdotibus ejus,  et Samuel inter eos qui invocant nomen ejus :  invocabant Dominum, et ipse exaudiebat eos ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֹ֘שֶׁ֤ה וְאַהֲרֹ֨ן ׀ בְּֽכֹהֲנָ֗יו וּ֭שְׁמוּאֵל בְּקֹרְאֵ֣י שְׁמ֑וֹ קֹרִ֥אים אֶל־יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה וְה֣וּא יַעֲנֵֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Moses and Aaron among his priests: and Samuel among them that call upon his name. They called upon the Lord, and he heard them:
verses.finnish_biblia: Moses ja Aaron hänen pappeinsa seassa, ja Samuel niiden seassa, jotka hänen nimeänsä avuksensa huutavat: he avuksensa huutavat Herraa, ja hän kuulee heidän rukouksensa.
verses.king_james: Moses and Aaron among his priests, and Samuel among them that call upon his name; they called upon the Lord, and he answered them.

verses.latin_vulgate: in columna nubis loquebatur ad eos.  Custodiebant testimonia ejus,  et præceptum quod dedit illis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּעַמּ֣וּד עָ֭נָן יְדַבֵּ֣ר אֲלֵיהֶ֑ם שָׁמְר֥וּ עֵ֝דֹתָ֗יו וְחֹ֣ק נָֽתַן־לָֽמוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: He spoke to them in the pillar of the cloud. They kept his testimonies, and the commandment which he gave them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän puhui heille pilven patsaasta: he pitivät hänen todistuksensa ja säätynsä, jonka hän heille antoi.
verses.king_james: He spake unto them in the cloudy pillar: they kept his testimonies, and the ordinance that he gave them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Domine Deus noster, tu exaudiebas eos ;  Deus, tu propitius fuisti eis,  et ulciscens in omnes adinventiones eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהֵינוּ֮ אַתָּ֢ה עֲנִ֫יתָ֥ם אֵ֣ל נֹ֭שֵׂא הָיִ֣יתָ לָהֶ֑ם וְ֝נֹקֵ֗ם עַל־עֲלִילוֹתָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou didst hear them, O Lord our God: thou wast a merciful God to them, and taking vengeance on all their inventions.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra, sinä olet Jumalamme, sinä kuulit heidän rukouksensa: sinä, Jumala, annoit heille anteeksi, ja laitit heidän työnsä.
verses.king_james: Thou answeredst them, O Lord our God: thou wast a God that forgavest them, though thou tookest vengeance of their inventions.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exaltate Dominum Deum nostrum,  et adorate in monte sancto ejus,  quoniam sanctus Dominus Deus noster.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רוֹמְמ֡וּ יְ֘הֹוָ֤ה אֱלֹהֵ֗ינוּ וְֽ֭הִשְׁתַּחֲווּ לְהַ֣ר קׇדְשׁ֑וֹ כִּי־קָ֝ד֗וֹשׁ יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהֵֽינוּ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Exalt ye the Lord our God, and adore at his holy mountain: for the Lord our God is holy.
verses.finnish_biblia: Korottakaat Herraa meidän Jumalaamme, ja kumartakaat hänen pyhällä vuorellansa; sillä Herra meidän Jumalamme on pyhä.
verses.king_james: Exalt the Lord our God, and worship at his holy hill; for the Lord our God is holy.
